name: spec-monkey
description: Spec-driven development in six skills: ideation works an ask through and converges on a design (triaging trivial changes and decomposing large ones into linked work items), reviewing-designs critiques that design before a contract is written, writing-specs composes a human-approved, thinly-sliced work-item spec that states WHAT to build and WHEN, reviewing-specs stress-tests the contract, implementing-specs builds it, and auditing-specs verifies the build truly satisfies the spec. The spec never prescribes HOW; that is left to the harness.
